title: Large-Scale UAV Swarm Coordination for Sensing and Communication: A Spatiotemporal Perspective
authors: Jirong Zha, Jiyuan Ren, Yuhan Cheng, Shiquan Yu, Geng Chen, Zuxin Li, Yanggang Xu, Zijian Xiao, Fan Dang, Yuqing Tang, Wei Ma, Guan Wang, Susu Xu, Xinlei Chen
title_zh: 大规模无人机群协调面向感知与通信：空间时间视角
